models.title: Model Catalog
models.subtitle: Browse and explore 14 high-quality models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google
models.noResults: No models found matching your filters.

modelDescriptions.gpt-4o: OpenAI flagship multimodal model with vision, audio, and text capabilities. Fast and cost-effective.
modelDescriptions.gpt-4o-mini: OpenAI lightweight and efficient model. Great value for high-volume tasks with excellent performance.
modelDescriptions.gpt-4.1: OpenAI's latest GPT-4.1 model with improved coding, instruction following, and long-context performance.
modelDescriptions.gpt-4.1-mini: Compact version of GPT-4.1. Excellent balance of capability and cost for most tasks.
modelDescriptions.gpt-4.1-nano: Smallest GPT-4.1 variant. Ultra-fast and cost-effective for simple tasks.
modelDescriptions.gpt-3.5-turbo: OpenAI classic model. Fast and cost-effective for simple tasks like summarization and classification.
modelDescriptions.gpt-3.5-turbo-0125: Latest GPT-3.5 Turbo snapshot from Jan 2025. Improved instruction following and JSON mode.
modelDescriptions.gpt-3.5-turbo-1106: GPT-3.5 Turbo snapshot from Nov 2023. Supports parallel function calling and JSON mode.
modelDescriptions.gpt-3.5-turbo-16k: Extended context version of GPT-3.5 Turbo with 16K token window for longer conversations.
modelDescriptions.gpt-3.5-turbo-16k-0613: Stable GPT-3.5 Turbo 16K snapshot from June 2023. Reliable for production use.
modelDescriptions.claude-opus-4-6: Anthropic's most powerful reasoning model. Excels at complex analysis, coding, and research tasks.
modelDescriptions.claude-opus-4-6-thinking: Claude Opus 4 with extended thinking. Shows step-by-step reasoning for complex problem solving.
modelDescriptions.claude-sonnet-4-6-thinking: Anthropic's balanced model with extended thinking. Great combination of speed, cost, and intelligence.
modelDescriptions.gemini-2.5-flash-thinking: Google's fast reasoning model. Combines speed with thoughtful analysis for efficient problem solving.
